scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:api
scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: cd artifacts/snk-inventory && cross-env PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && cross-env PORT=3001 npm run mock
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd artifacts/snk-inventory && npm install && cd ../api-server && npm install
